description: Safe-looking and unset values with a synthetic version beyond the tested range conservatively produce a stale-ruleset result for every codex rule.

findings.message: Unverified — last-known rule indicates: Effective usage analytics telemetry posture cannot be determined from an unset user-level value because uninspected configuration layers may supply or override it. Observed: analytics.enabled unset in user config.
findings.stale_reason: detected version 9.9.9 is outside every tested range (max tested 0.144.5)

findings.message: Unverified — last-known rule indicates: Effective feedback submission channel posture cannot be determined from an unset user-level value because uninspected configuration layers may supply or override it. Observed: feedback.enabled unset in user config.
findings.stale_reason: detected version 9.9.9 is outside every tested range (max tested 0.144.5)

findings.message: Unverified — last-known rule indicates: The inspected user-level config sets history.persistence = "none". Observed: history.persistence = "none".
findings.stale_reason: detected version 9.9.9 is outside every tested range (max tested 0.144.5)
